# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This repository is maintained as an educational and research-oriented project. At this stage, security updates are applied only to the latest version available on the `main` branch.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| main    | ✅        |
| older versions | ❌ |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability related to this repository, please do not disclose it publicly at first.

Instead, please report it responsibly by contacting the author directly through GitHub or the contact information provided in the repository profile.

When reporting a vulnerability, please include:

- A clear description of the issue
- The affected file, module, or workflow
- Steps to reproduce the problem, if applicable
- Any suggestions that may help understand or mitigate the issue

You can expect an initial response within a reasonable time, depending on availability.

Please note that this repository is primarily intended for educational and research purposes. While reasonable efforts will be made to review and address valid security concerns, no formal security support or guarantee is provided.
